name: io.github.SpikeyCoder/website-auditor-mcp
title: Website Auditor
description: AI visibility + site audits: see if ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude & Gemini recommend a website.

environmentVariables.name: WA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Per-user API key (starts with 'wa_') minted from a Website Auditor account at https://website-auditor.io. Free tools work with any valid key; Pro tools require an active subscription.

environmentVariables.name: WA_API_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Website Auditor API this server wraps. Defaults to the public production host.
